name: Paid Summarize Demo
description: A paid text summarization agent that demonstrates the x402 payment flow. Identical to the free summarize agent but requires a USDC micro-payment per invocation via the HTTP 402 protocol.

skills.name: Paid Summarize Text
skills.description: Condenses a passage of text into a short summary. Requires x402 payment (0.001 USDC on Base) before the summary is returned. Without payment proof the endpoint returns an HTTP 402 challenge.

maxSentences.description: Number of sentences in the summary. Defaults to 3.

sentences.description: Number of sentences in the returned summary

paid.description: Whether this response was served after a verified payment

paymentId.description: Unique ID for the processed payment

input.text: The James Webb Space Telescope is a space telescope designed to conduct infrared astronomy.

examples.description: Request with payment proof returns summary

input.text: The James Webb Space Telescope is a space telescope designed to conduct infrared astronomy.

expectedOutput.summary: The James Webb Space Telescope conducts infrared astronomy. It observes objects too distant or faint for Hubble.
